title: rubus × costei
intro: Rubus × costei, also known as the hybrid raspberry, is a cross between the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the Japanese raspberry (Rubus fruticosus). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Rubus × costei include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Rubus × costei can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and jams, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
